DS
Design System

ContatoContact

Formulário completo de contato com seleção de assunto via Select, textarea para mensagem, Radio group para prioridade, confirmação de envio via Alert e validação de campos obrigatórios. Complete contact form with subject selection via Select, message textarea, Radio group for priority, submission confirmation via Alert, and required field validation.

Input Textarea Select Radio Checkbox Alert Button

Preview

Mensagem enviada!Message sent!

Retornaremos em até 2 dias úteis para o e-mail informado. We'll respond within 2 business days to the email provided.

Fale conoscoGet in touch

Preencha o formulário e nossa equipe entrará em contato. Fill in the form and our team will get back to you.

*
*
*
*
Quanto mais detalhes, mais rápido poderemos ajudar.The more details you provide, the faster we can help.
PrioridadePriority 
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Contato</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/design-system.css">
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }
    body { background: var(--ds-background-subtle); min-height: 100vh; margin: 0; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: center; padding: var(--ds-dimension-40); }
    .contact-card { background: var(--ds-surface-default); border-radius: var(--ds-radius-lg); padding: var(--ds-dimension-32); width: 100%; max-width: 560px; border: 1px solid var(--ds-border-default); }
    .contact-name-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: var(--ds-dimension-16); margin-bottom: var(--ds-dimension-16); }
    @media (max-width: 540px) { .contact-name-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } body { padding: var(--ds-dimension-16); } }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<div style="width:100%;max-width:560px">

  <!-- Show this alert after successful submission -->
  <div class="ds-alert ds-alert--success ds-alert--subtle" style="margin-bottom:var(--ds-dimension-24);display:none" role="alert" id="success-alert">
    <div class="ds-alert__content">
      <p class="ds-alert__title">Mensagem enviada!</p>
      <span class="ds-alert__description">Retornaremos em até 2 dias úteis.</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="contact-card">
    <h1 style="font-size:var(--ds-body-font-size-xl);font-weight:var(--ds-body-font-weight-bold);color:var(--ds-content-strong);margin:0 0 var(--ds-dimension-4)">Fale conosco</h1>
    <p style="font-size:var(--ds-body-font-size-md);color:var(--ds-content-default);margin:0 0 var(--ds-dimension-24)">Preencha o formulário e nossa equipe entrará em contato.</p>

    <form id="contact-form" novalidate>

      <div class="contact-name-row">
        <div class="ds-field">
          <div class="ds-field__label-row">
            <label class="ds-field__label" for="name">Nome</label>
            <span class="ds-field__required" aria-hidden="true">*</span>
          </div>
          <div class="ds-input ds-input--lg">
            <input class="ds-input__field" type="text" id="name" autocomplete="given-name" required>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="ds-field">
          <div class="ds-field__label-row">
            <label class="ds-field__label" for="email">E-mail</label>
            <span class="ds-field__required" aria-hidden="true">*</span>
          </div>
          <div class="ds-input ds-input--lg">
            <input class="ds-input__field" type="email" id="email" placeholder="seu@email.com" autocomplete="email" required>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ds-field" style="margin-bottom:var(--ds-dimension-16)">
        <div class="ds-field__label-row">
          <label class="ds-field__label" for="subject">Assunto</label>
          <span class="ds-field__required" aria-hidden="true">*</span>
        </div>
        <div class="ds-select ds-select--lg">
          <select class="ds-select__field" id="subject" required>
            <option value="">Selecione um assunto...</option>
            <option>Dúvida técnica</option>
            <option>Proposta comercial</option>
            <option>Parceria</option>
            <option>Outro</option>
          </select>
          <span class="ds-select__arrow" aria-hidden="true"></span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ds-field" style="margin-bottom:var(--ds-dimension-16)">
        <div class="ds-field__label-row">
          <label class="ds-field__label" for="message">Mensagem</label>
          <span class="ds-field__required" aria-hidden="true">*</span>
        </div>
        <div class="ds-textarea">
          <textarea class="ds-textarea__field" id="message" rows="5" required></textarea>
        </div>
        <span class="ds-field__helper">Quanto mais detalhes, mais rápido poderemos ajudar.</span>
      </div>

      <fieldset style="border:none;padding:0;margin:0 0 var(--ds-dimension-24)">
        <legend style="font-size:var(--ds-body-font-size-sm);font-weight:var(--ds-body-font-weight-medium);color:var(--ds-content-strong);margin-bottom:var(--ds-dimension-12)">Prioridade</legend>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:var(--ds-dimension-24)">
          <label class="ds-radio-label">
            <input class="ds-radio" type="radio" name="priority" value="low">
            <span class="ds-radio__content"><span class="ds-radio__label">Baixa</span></span>
          </label>
          <label class="ds-radio-label">
            <input class="ds-radio" type="radio" name="priority" value="medium" checked>
            <span class="ds-radio__content"><span class="ds-radio__label">Média</span></span>
          </label>
          <label class="ds-radio-label">
            <input class="ds-radio" type="radio" name="priority" value="high">
            <span class="ds-radio__content"><span class="ds-radio__label">Alta</span></span>
          </label>
        </div>
      </fieldset>

      <label class="ds-checkbox-label" style="margin-bottom:var(--ds-dimension-32)">
        <input class="ds-checkbox" type="checkbox" id="privacy" required>
        <span class="ds-checkbox__content">
          <span class="ds-checkbox__label">
            Concordo com a <a class="ds-link" href="/privacy">Política de privacidade</a>
          </span>
        </span>
      </label>

      <button class="ds-btn ds-btn--brand ds-btn--lg ds-btn--full" type="submit">
        <span class="ds-btn__label">Enviar mensagem</span>
      </button>

    </form>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  document.getElementById('contact-form').addEventListener('submit', function (e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    // Replace with your form submission logic
    document.getElementById('success-alert').style.display = '';
    this.reset();
    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>

Notas de usoUsage notes

PadrãoPatternDecisãoDecision
<fieldset> + <legend> no Radio groupfor Radio groupSemântica nativa de agrupamento — screen readers anunciam a pergunta antes de cada opção, sem JavaScript adicional.Native grouping semantics — screen readers announce the question before each option, without additional JavaScript.
Alert de sucesso oculto inicialmenteSuccess alert hidden initiallyO alert de confirmação é renderizado no DOM mas oculto (display:none). Exiba-o via JS após o envio e use role="alert" para anúncio automático em leitores de tela.The confirmation alert is rendered in the DOM but hidden (display:none). Show it via JS after submission and use role="alert" for automatic screen reader announcement.
Textarea com ds-field__helperTextarea with ds-field__helperO texto auxiliar abaixo da textarea define a expectativa de qualidade antes do erro — reduz reenvios por mensagens incompletas.Helper text below the textarea sets quality expectations before the error — reduces resubmissions due to incomplete messages.

Templates relacionadosRelated templates

Login CadastroSign Up Ver todos os templatesAll templates
